parameters.query:
SELECT
  regexp_replace(identificacion, '\D', '', 'g') AS identificacion,
  nombre                         AS db_nombre,
  salario_base                   AS db_salario_base,
  codigo_empresa                 AS db_codigo_empresa,
  estado                         AS db_estado,
  COALESCE(iess_quirograficos,0) AS db_iess_quirograficos,
  COALESCE(sueldo_variable,0)    AS db_sueldo_variable,
  COALESCE(transporte,0)         AS db_transporte,
  COALESCE(movilizacion,0)       AS db_movilizacion,
  COALESCE(compensacion,0)       AS db_compensacion,
  COALESCE(utilidades,0)         AS db_utilidades,
  COALESCE(otros_ingresos,0)     AS db_otros_ingresos,
  COALESCE(anticipos,0)          AS db_anticipos,
  COALESCE(prestamos_empresa,0)  AS db_prestamos_empresa,
  COALESCE(crediflash,0)         AS db_crediflash,
  COALESCE(saludsa,0)            AS db_saludsa,
  COALESCE(decimos_mensual, true) AS db_decimos_mensual,
  /* === AÑADE ESTA LÍNEA === */
  valor_alimentacion_4_5         AS db_valor_alimentacion_4_5
FROM empleados
WHERE estado = 'activo'
  {{ $json.codigo_empresa ? `AND codigo_empresa = '${$json.codigo_empresa}'` : '' }};
